prompt_replacements.old: Create question_inputs for concrete values supplied by the question or conversation resolution that a population predicate, result key, time constraint, compute expression, or result limit consumes.
prompt_replacements.new: Create question_inputs for concrete values supplied by the question or conversation resolution that a population predicate, time constraint, compute expression, result limit, or closed set of explicitly named group members consumes.

prompt_replacements.old: Each question_input must have one primary contract role: population predicate operand, result key, time constraint, computation operand, or result limit.
prompt_replacements.new: A grouping dimension or temporal grain is answer_expression structure, not a question_input.

prompt_replacements.old: Use GROUP_KEY when the input defines a requested result group under SPECIFIED_QUESTION_INPUTS.
prompt_replacements.new: Use GROUP_KEY only when a concrete question input is one member of the closed group set under SPECIFIED_QUESTION_INPUTS.
